summary:
There are numCourses courses labeled 0 to numCourses - 1, and prerequisites is a list of pairs [a, b] meaning course b must come before course a.

Return any valid ordering in which all courses can be taken. If finishing every course is impossible because of a cycle, return an empty array.

examples.explanation: A single course with no prerequisites; the only ordering is [0].
Course 0 has no prerequisite and must precede course 1, so the order is [0, 1].

constraints: Each prerequisites[i] = [a, b] with 0 <= a, b < numCourses
Return an empty array if no valid ordering exists; otherwise any valid ordering is accepted
